title: RainbowTale
description: A texture pack with a comfort-oriented style
body:
![ysp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb5ddca455050edeb5fc60eb9c35be2dfdbb1e2b.png)

![fms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9fb2755c502f399e8d1d1fecd12ee57960ed969c.png)

This is a comprehensive texture pack currently in development, which includes corresponding attribute displays for weapons, potions, and enchanted books.

Weapon Visualization: Only supports version 1.21.5 and above.

Potion Visualization: Works natively in version 1.21.5 and above. For versions below 1.21.5, the CIT mod is required.

Enchanted Book Visualization: Works natively in version 1.21.5 and above. For versions below 1.21.5, the CIT mod is required.

(Please ignore version warnings and use directly.)
